summary:
Vocimagene amiretrorepvec has not been evaluated or reported as an efficacious treatment for recurrent high-grade glioma due to a lack of specific clinical trial data supporting its use. No direct evidence exists regarding its effectiveness in this patient population. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$

The summary should reflect only what was reasoned by Agent2; do NOT add external knowledge.

Vocimagene amiretrorepvec lacks documented efficacy in recurrent high-grade glioma because no clinical trials support its use in this condition. There is insufficient evidence from existing sources confirming its effectiveness for patients with such tumors.  

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$
